Name: Bombay North
Address: Our preference is to situate the installation at a significant separation from the town center, safeguarding the sky from surrounding light sources and supporting the intended stargazing experience. We have scoped a specific shoreline site on the beach that is zoned for open space recreation and is not under IID stewardship. Specifically at 33°20'54.6"N, 115°42'42.9"W. Still, we stay sincerely flexible and would gladly consider substitute sites, especially should a supportive steward, stakeholder, or organization be interested in sponsoring or hosting the installation.
Installations/Art pieces: L and the Angel Cat | Salton Sea Stellar Sky Society: Star Sight Site

Name: Get Lost Gallery
Address: The project utilizes a hybrid "scattered-site" model across Bombay Beach:  Central Hub & Gallery Venue: The Electric Lounge.  Satellite Archive Sites: 10 solar-powered beacon locations positioned on vacant lots and in collaboration with local mural sites throughout the town (specific coordinates to be finalized with the BBB placement team).
